input.subject: Appointment Confirmation - Dr. Jennifer Smith
input.body_text:
Dear Patient,

Your appointment has been confirmed:

Provider: Dr. Jennifer Smith, MD
Specialty: Internal Medicine
Date: Tuesday, February 3, 2026
Time: 10:30 AM
Duration: 30 minutes

Location:
Valley Medical Center
1500 Medical Plaza Drive, Suite 200
San Jose, CA 95128

Please arrive 15 minutes early to complete paperwork.
Bring your insurance card and a valid photo ID.

To reschedule or cancel, please call (408) 555-1234
at least 24 hours in advance.

Thank you for choosing Valley Medical Center.

Best regards,
Valley Medical Center Scheduling Team
